title: FLUX.2 Klein Style LoRA
description: Remote-friendly Klein style LoRA recipe aligned with mere.run's built-in klein-fast-style preset.

notes: Prefer content diversity over repeated near-duplicates.
Avoid square-cropping vertical source formats unless the desired output is square.

captioning.technique: Use a distinct trigger token in every caption, then describe only visible content. Do not describe the style you want the LoRA to learn.
rules: Start every caption with the trigger token.
Describe subject, setting, composition, lighting, and medium if visible.
Do not use evaluative style labels such as beautiful, iconic, cinematic, or X-like unless the image literally contains that text.
Do not mention that this image is part of a set.
examples: stylemark. A red motorcycle is parked under an elevated expressway on a rainy night, bright streetlights reflecting on wet pavement.
stylemark. A worried young man in a red jacket looks sideways from deep shadow near a city street.

prompts: STYLE_TRIGGER a young biker in a red jacket beside a futuristic motorcycle under an elevated expressway at night, rain-soaked city, glowing traffic signals, tense urban science fiction film still
STYLE_TRIGGER a quiet diner interior at midnight with a single person sitting near a window, wet streets outside, dramatic overhead lighting
